violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application given to person in charge at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dishwasher to WASH ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The faucet of the hand sink in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. A plumbing system must be in good repair and proper adjustment. Per PIC, a maintenance service is pending for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cucumbers) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dishwasher for WASHING ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Various items in the refrigeration units were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
